command_templates.codex: codex --search exec --cd /Users/mike/AiReslienceEvaluator --model gpt-5.4 --sandbox workspace-write --output-schema response-schema.json -o codex-response.raw.json - < prompt.md
command_templates.claude: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-6 --effort high --permission-mode dontAsk --allowedTools Read,WebSearch,WebFetch --output-format json --json-schema "$(cat response-schema.json)" < prompt.md > claude-response.raw.json

drift_rules.none: same rank order, same quadrant per company, and every company total differs by at most 2 points
drift_rules.moderate: same rank order and same top-ranked company, but any company total differs by 3 to 5 points or theme emphasis materially differs
drift_rules.high: rank order changes, top-ranked company changes, any company changes quadrant, or any company total differs by 6 or more points
